name: And the Winner Is Love
overview: Chong Xuezhi, the young mistress of Chonghuo Palace, and Shangguan Tou, master of Yueshang Valley, overcome misunderstandings to stop Mu Yuan, who practices the dangerous "Nine Techniques of the Lotus God," and restore peace to the jianghu.

trailers.title: Trailer:28th May! Leo Luo&Yukee Chen sweet love coming~罗云熙陈钰琪甜宠来袭|And The Winner Is Love月上重火|iQIYI
